title: Three Fables of Love
director: Alessandro Blasetti, Hervé Bromberger, René Clair
writer: Rafael Azcona, Isa Bartalini, Alessandro Blasetti
actors: Leslie Caron, Charles Aznavour, Raymond Bussières
plot: "Les quatre vérités" aka "The Four Truths" is a movie anthology that consists of four segments, all loosely parodying fables from the 17th-century French poet Jean de la Fontaine. The US cut usually features only 3 segments.
